div1.entryFree:
Paragon, vb. 1) to show off as a pattern: before the primest creature that's --ed o' the world, H8 II, 4, 230.
2) to serve as a pattern for, to excel: a maid that --s description and wild fame, Oth. II, 1, 62.
3) to compare as with a pattern: I will give thee bloody teeth, if thou with Caesar p. again my man of men, Ant. I, 5, 71.
